meta.title: Ukulanda Ivideo - Landa Amavideo e-Instagram, YouTube & Facebook
meta.description: Landa amavideo e-Instagram, YouTube ne-Facebook mahhala. Akudingeki uhlelo lokusebenza. Kusheshayo futhi kulula.

hero.title: Ukulanda Ivideo ye-Instagram & Facebook
hero.subtitle: Landa amavideo e-Instagram Reels, Facebook ne-YouTube ngokushesha. Mahhala, kusheshayo, akudingeki uhlelo.

howto.title: Indlela Yokulanda Amavideo
howto.step1_desc: Vula i-Instagram, YouTube noma Facebook bese ukopisha isixhumanisi sevideo.
howto.step2_desc: Namathisela isixhumanisi ebhokisini elingenhla bese ucindezela inkinobho Yokulanda.
howto.step3_desc: Khetha ikhwalithi ofuna yona bese ugcina ivideo kudivayisi yakho.

result.title: Ivideo Yakho Ilungile!
result.error: Ayikwazanga ukuthola ivideo. Sicela uhlole isixhumanisi bese uzama futhi.
result.invalid_url: Sicela ufake isixhumanisi esifanele se-Instagram, TikTok, Facebook noma YouTube.

faq.title: Imibuzo Ebuzwa Njalo
faq.a1: Yebo, imahhala ngokuphelele. Akudingeki ukubhalisa noma uhlelo lokusebenza.
faq.a2: Instagram (Reels, Izithombe, Stories), YouTube (Amavideo, Shorts), ne-Facebook (Amavideo, Reels).
faq.a3: Yebo. Asigcini izixhumanisi zakho noma amavideo. Konke kwenziwa ngesikhathi sangempela.

trending.title: Amavideo Aphezulu Kule Sonto
trending.subtitle: Cindezela ukubukela ku-YouTube • kopisha isixhumanisi ukuze ulanda

footer.tagline: Ukulanda ivideo ngokushesha nangamahhala kusuka ezinkundleni zakho ozithandayo.
footer.disclaimer: Le nsiza ingasetshenziswa ngomuntu ngamunye kuphela. Sicela uhloniphe imithetho yamalungelo.
